frames.name: Qualification Skepticism
frames.description: Emphasizes Means' lack of medical license and unconventional background as disqualifying factors
frames.emphasis: Medical credentials gap - Stanford degree but no active license, dropped out of residency, career as wellness influencer rather than practicing physician

frames.name: Confirmation Performance Analysis
frames.description: Focuses on how Means moderated her tone and messaging during the hearing compared to her previous public statements
frames.emphasis: Strategic presentation shift - toned down eccentric wellness beliefs, sought common ground, avoided controversial topics she previously embraced

frames.name: Vaccine Messaging Concerns
frames.description: Centers on Means' evasive responses about vaccine recommendations and public health messaging
frames.emphasis: Reluctance to provide clear vaccine advocacy despite role requiring public health leadership on vaccination campaigns

frames.name: Financial Conflicts of Interest
frames.description: Highlights potential ethics issues from her business relationships and promotional activities
frames.emphasis: Half-million dollar earnings from wellness companies, undisclosed promotional relationships, ongoing ties to Levels Health company

frames.name: MAHA Movement Integration
frames.description: Positions Means as part of broader 'Make America Healthy Again' agenda alongside RFK Jr.
frames.emphasis: Alliance with Kennedy, co-authored book considered 'MAHA bible,' represents alternative health approach in Trump administration

outlierPerspectives: The Atlantic's detailed coverage of Means' spiritual and unconventional wellness beliefs (talking to trees, natural disasters as 'communication from God')
Axios' focus on internal Trump administration tensions over Kennedy's agenda, including the glyphosate executive order controversy
missingContext: Comparison to previous surgeon generals' qualifications and backgrounds
Details about the Senate committee's composition and likely voting patterns
Broader context about the surgeon general's actual powers and responsibilities
Public health community's formal response or position statements
Timeline and process for confirmation vote
Means' specific policy positions on major public health issues beyond vaccines
